meta.summary: MUMmer4 4.0.1 command-line runtime for fast whole-genome nucleotide and translated alignments, delta filtering, coordinate/SNP reporting, dnadiff summaries, and mummerplot dotplots.
meta.description: MUMmer4 4.0.1 command-line runtime for fast whole-genome nucleotide and translated alignments, delta filtering, coordinate/SNP reporting, dnadiff summaries, and mummerplot dotplots.

test: nucmer --help 2>&1 | grep -F "Usage: nucmer" >/dev/null && promer -h 2>&1 | grep -F "USAGE: promer" >/dev/null && dnadiff -h 2>&1 | grep -F "USAGE: dnadiff" >/dev/null && delta-filter -h 2>&1 | grep -F "delta-filter" >/dev/null && show-coords -h 2>&1 | grep -F "show-coords" >/dev/null && mummerplot -h 2>&1 | grep -F "USAGE: mummerplot" >/dev/null

for cmd in nucmer mummer delta-filter show-coords show-snps show-diff show-aligns show-tiling repeat-match mgaps annotate combineMUMs; do ldd "$(command -v "$cmd")" 2>&1 | grep -F "not found" && exit 1 || true; done

tmp=/tmp/taf-mummer4-smoke-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; printf ">ref
" > ref.fa; i=0; while [ "$i" -lt 20 ]; do printf "ACGTTGCAAGTCGATCGTACGATCGTAGCTAG" >> ref.fa; i=$((i + 1)); done; printf "
" >> ref.fa; printf ">qry
" > qry.fa; i=0; while [ "$i" -lt 20 ]; do printf "ACGTTGCAAGTCGATCGTACGATCGTAGCTAG" >> qry.fa; i=$((i + 1)); done; printf "
" >> qry.fa; nucmer -p smoke ref.fa qry.fa >/tmp/taf-mummer4-nucmer.log 2>&1; test -s smoke.delta; delta-filter -m smoke.delta > smoke.m.delta; test -s smoke.m.delta; show-coords -T -H smoke.m.delta > smoke.coords; test -s smoke.coords; mummer -mum -b -c ref.fa qry.fa > smoke.mums; test -s smoke.mums; dnadiff -p diff ref.fa qry.fa >/tmp/taf-mummer4-dnadiff.log 2>&1; test -s diff.report; mummerplot -p plot -t png smoke.delta >/tmp/taf-mummer4-mummerplot.log 2>&1; test -s plot.gp; test -s plot.png; rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: MUMmer4
upstream.citation: Marcais et al. 2018, MUMmer4: A fast and versatile genome alignment system
